root.name: add_agenda_slide_with_bullet_list
root.description: Evaluates if a new 'Agenda' slide is correctly added with specified bullet points between slides 1 and 2.

children.name: agenda_slide_added_correctly
children.description: Checks if a slide titled 'Agenda' is added at the correct position (between slide 1 and 2).

children.name: agenda_slide_position
children.description: Verifies 'Agenda' slide is inserted at index 2 (between original slides 1 and 2).

children.name: slide_present
children.description: Verifies a slide titled 'Agenda' exists in the modified presentation.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score():
    from pptx import Presentation
    modified = Presentation(modified_ppt_path)
    original = Presentation(original_ppt_path)
    modified_slides = modified.slides
    original_slides = original.slides
    modified_slide_ids = [slide.slide_id for slide in modified_slides]
    original_slide_ids = [slide.slide_id for slide in original_slides]
    new_slides = [slide for slide in modified_slides if slide.slide_id not in original_slide_ids]
    deleted_slides = [slide for slide in original_slides if slide.slide_id not in modified_slide_ids]
    for slide in new_slides:
        # Check if title exists before accessing text
        if not slide.shapes.title:
            continue
        # Check that the title has a text attribute
        if not hasattr(slide.shapes.title, "text"):
            continue
        # Check if the title text matches "Agenda"
        if slide.shapes.title.text.lower().strip() != "agenda":
            continue
        else:
            return 'Agenda slide found in added slides.', 1.0
    return 'Agenda slide not found.', 0.0

children.description: Checks if the new slide is titled 'Agenda'.

children.reason: The presentation successfully avoided any unintended modifications, with both sub-criteria performing perfectly. No extra slides were added beyond the required Agenda slide, and all existing slides remained unchanged from their original state. This clean implementation demonstrates careful attention to preserving the original content while only making the specifically requested additions.

root.reason: The criterion received a failing score because the fundamental requirement was completely unmet - no agenda slide was added to the presentation at all. Since all three critical sub-criteria depend on the existence of an agenda slide titled "Agenda" positioned between the original first and second slides, they all failed when no such slide could be found anywhere in the presentation. Without the basic presence of the agenda slide, it was impossible to evaluate whether it contained the required bullet points or was positioned correctly, making this a complete failure to fulfill the core task requirement.

metadata.task: Add a bullet point list with three items: 'Obesity definition', 'Global statistics', and 'Impact on health' as a new slide between 1 and 2, titled "Agenda"
